summary: Test coverage for client.test.ts exercises does not inherit a local api key when a provider auth token is explicit; preserves an explicit api key when the caller opts into dual auth; falls back to the local api key when no provider auth token is present; passes bearer-token provider auth without an SDK api key
quotes_or_symbols: does not inherit a local api key when a provider auth token is explicit
preserves an explicit api key when the caller opts into dual auth
falls back to the local api key when no provider auth token is present
passes bearer-token provider auth without an SDK api key
